rows.label: qev031204_MSG0001
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Lavina![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hehe...
You knew I'd be here, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0004
rows.name:
Of course I did! That day...
When we snuck out of NLA and came here together...
We promised each other our futures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0005
rows.name:
There's no way you'd go anywhere
other than here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0006
rows.name:
...What you have in your hand,
is that the Sapphire Single-Horn
and the Ringstone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hehe, well then, I'll have you fulfill
our promise from that day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0008
rows.name:
You see, the Bias...
We are bound together when our beloved places
a ring made from a beast's horn on our finger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0009
rows.name:
And once a couple is bound, not even a parent
can ever tear them apart...
That is the marriage law of the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0010
rows.name:
So, Leroy. You are going to marry me
right here... Got it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0011
rows.name:
Of course...
I'll absolutely make you happy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0012
rows.name: I believed you would say that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well then... Hey, you there.
Would you bear witness to our marriage?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031204_SEL0011
rows.name: Agree to witness their marriage.

rows.label: qev031204_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031204_SEL0021
rows.name:
State that you are not in a position
to bless them.

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0014
rows.name:
We might be forsaken by our parents and comrades, but
as long as there's even one person who understands...
We can keep going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0015
rows.name: ...Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0016
rows.name:
I see...
It's sad to not be blessed by anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0017
rows.name:
But this is also the path we chose.
No matter what anyone says, we will be together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0018
rows.name: I will not allow that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0019
rows.name:
I finally found you, Lavina!
Now, hurry up and come back to everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0020
rows.name: ...Eek! Father-in-law!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0021
rows.name:
You weakling! I have no reason to be called
father-in-law by the likes of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0022
rows.name:
Now, [ST:playername ]...
Capture them right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0023
rows.name:
...What are you hesitating for?
Do you really think a pathetic man like that
can protect Lavina?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031204_SEL0031
rows.name:
State that protecting Lavina for life
is Leroy's job.

rows.label: qev031204_JNK0040
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031204_SEL0041
rows.name:
Honestly express your impression that
Leroy cannot protect Lavina.

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Thank you.
I will absolutely never betray... your trust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0025
rows.name:
Nnngh...! You betrayed me!
You looked decent, but in the end,
you're just an Earthling![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0026
rows.name:
Then I'll bathe you in blood first!
I won't give my daughter to you aliens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0027
rows.name: ...Everyone really refuses to accept us, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0028
rows.name:
Heh, you have no allies!
Quietly return Lavina to the Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0029
rows.name:
It doesn't matter if it's Earthlings or Bias...
If it comes to it, I'll turn everyone into my enemy
to protect our love.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0030
rows.name: ...Lavina, this way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: NewText_51
rows.name: Eh... Ah! Right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0031
rows.name:
Guh... They ran!
Everyone, after him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031204_MSG0032
rows.name:
[ST:playername ], lend us a hand too.
We're taking Lavina back from that coward of an Earthling![ST:wait ]
